body.title: CC walk: Igor fixes __identify__ ping counted as interaction
body.result: Target ticket already done. Walk admin close.
body.description:
Target: T-web-channel-identify-not-interaction. Stale proposal cleared. Touches web/server.py or main.py inbound router.

Checklist:
1. Set priority=0.95 on target; watch Igor claim
2. PLAN: web/server.py or main.py — not HIGH-inertia
3. Watch implementation: __identify__: prefix → auth handler, not interaction loop
4. Verify no interaction counter bump in tests
5. Commit + done

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/web/server.py or wild_igor/igor/main.py
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — scaffold T-web-channel-identify-not-interaction
**Test plan:** target done.
